text.title: IaC Module Composition Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `IaC Module Composition Patterns` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: graph-audit
step.action: Build dependency graph; identify cycles + duplicate ownership.

step.name: extract-leaves
step.action: Promote logical groups to leaf modules; rewrite root to wire them.

step.name: outputs-contract
step.action: Document every output as a stable contract; deprecate renamed outputs over 1 major cycle.
